description_long: This handgun features a compact, boxy design with a matte dark blue-black finish on the slide and grip, accented by metallic and red components. The grip is angular and slightly flared at the base, with subtle horizontal lines suggesting a segmented or modular construction. The trigger guard is robust and squared, with a thick lower section that appears reinforced and possibly houses an accessory rail. The barrel is short and recessed within the slide, with a prominent red muzzle device or cap visible from the front. Minimal external markings are present, giving the weapon a utilitarian, almost futuristic appearance. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, lacking any finger extensions or embellishments.
description: A compact, boxy handgun with a dark blue-black finish, angular grip, and a prominent red muzzle device. The design is minimalistic and modern, with subtle metallic accents and a robust trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the slide, grip, and the red muzzle device beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the prominent red muzzle device below it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the slide, grip, and the red muzzle device, with visible panel lines and a triangular marking.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the slide and grip, with no visible sights or controls.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angular and slightly flared at the base, with a segmented appearance created by horizontal lines. It has a smooth, matte finish with no visible texturing or checkering, and lacks finger grooves or ergonomic contouring. The material appears to be a high-strength polymer, and there are no visible logos or embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick, squared, and robust, with a reinforced lower section that may serve as an accessory rail. It lacks undercuts or aggressive texturing, and its size suggests added protection and structural strength.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and recessed within the slide, with a prominent red muzzle device or cap attached to the front. The exterior is smooth and unmarked, with no visible threading, porting, or fluting.
attribute_slide_markings: There are minimal external markings on the slide, with only a small white triangular marking visible on one side. No manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations are present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extensions, bevels, or finger rests. It is simple and unadorned, matching the utilitarian aesthetic of the handgun.
